mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.target_id, c.parent_id, c.user_id, c.reply_user_id, c.content, c.like_count, c.create_time, u.nickname AS user_nickname, u.avatar AS user_avatar, ru.nickname AS reply_user_name FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user ru ON c.reply_user_id = ru.id WHERE c.target_id = #{targetId} AND c.type = #{type} AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.create_time ASC
